# Drip AI & Data

> Enterprise-grade decision intelligence for mid-market leaders in financial services, healthcare, and cybersecurity. Over a decade of Fortune 500 data and AI leadership at a fraction of the in-house cost.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Services, credentials, and how Drip AI & Data partners with mid-market leaders.
- [Our Work](/work): Selected client engagements with verified outcomes.
- [Drip Labs](/labs): Internal R&D arm — production systems built to validate ideas.
- [About](/about): Founder background and career history.

## Case Studies

- [Global MarTech Transformation](/work/global-martech-transformation): Nine-market analytics rebuild, +293% quote form conversion.
- [Real-Time Content Personalization](/work/real-time-content-personalization): First-party personalization framework, +650% CTA engagement.
- [Congressional Trades Fund](/labs/congressional-trades-fund): Autonomous trading pipeline on STOCK Act disclosures.
- [Dynasty War Room](/labs/dynasty-war-room): Multi-league fantasy football platform with full NFL salary cap modeling.

- [Book a consultation](/#consultation): Free intro call.
